coach_notes: To build a strong administrative career, focus on developing customer service and data entry skills, as they are highly valued in office roles. You can start by taking free online courses on platforms like Coursera or LinkedIn Learning, and practice by volunteering for tasks that involve organizing information or assisting others. Your existing attention to detail and communication skills will give you a great foundation to grow these abilities quickly!

jobs.title: Scheduling Administrative Assistant
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong alignment with administrative tasks, organization, detail orientation, and scheduling. Your communication skills and teamwork are essential for this role.
jobs.gaps: No explicit scheduling software experience mentioned; may need to adapt to specific tools used by the employer.

jobs.title: Internship: R&D Events & Project Coordination (H2/2026)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your organizational and administrative skills, along with teamwork and communication, are directly applicable to coordinating events and projects. Detail orientation and readiness support planning and execution.
jobs.gaps: No explicit event or project coordination experience; R&D context may require technical or scientific familiarity not evident in resume.

jobs.title: NSC/ASC Junior Procurement Analyst
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Business acumen, organizational skills, and attention to detail are relevant to procurement analysis. Your coding and stock experience may support data handling and inventory concepts.
jobs.gaps: No direct procurement or analyst experience; junior role may require specific procurement knowledge or tools (e.g., SAP).

jobs.title: Assistant Manager
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your organizational, teamwork, and communication skills support assistant management duties. Business and administrative experience provide a foundation.
jobs.gaps: No direct management or supervisory experience; assistant manager roles often require leadership or decision-making examples.

jobs.title: Assistant
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: General administrative and organizational skills are applicable. Detail orientation and readiness support assistant tasks.
jobs.gaps: Job title 'Assistant' is vague; without more context, it's unclear if specific industry or technical skills are needed. No direct assistant role experience listed.
